goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should 'arrive by 12:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'departure time', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'whale of a time'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should depart from ely and should arrive by 12:45
Make sure you get train ID, departure time, and travel time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called whale of a time
Make sure you get area and postcode
